title: centipeda orbicularis var. lanuginosa
intro: Centipeda orbicularis var. lanuginosa, also known as White Flower or White Headed Centipede Grass, is a plant species native to Australia and Southeast Asia, characterized by its white or yellowish flowers and hairy leaves. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Centipeda orbicularis var. lanuginosa include its ability to soothe and calm the skin, reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and topical creams, where it is valued for its ability to treat skin conditions, wounds, and inflammatory disorders.
